name: M4A4 | 全球攻势
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. It has been custom painted with a blue, yellow, and grey camoflauge. \"We'll make first contact in Harz, Germany at 17:25 GMT+1...\"
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把武器采用黄、蓝、灰迷彩元素组成的自定义图案。 \"首次接头地点：德国，哈茨山，时间：17:25 GMT+1 ...该消息将于5秒后被自动销毁。\"
